title: linaria viscosa subsp. viscosa
intro: Linaria viscosa subsp. viscosa, also known as sticky toadflax or sticky linaria, is a perennial plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Linaria viscosa subsp. viscosa include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and ease menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
